behaviors.description: Embedding vector dimensionality matches the vector DB index dimension.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is the real embedding-model output handed to vector-index constraints. A stubbed embedding would hide real failures like model/version misconfiguration changing dimension. Rejected Integration because behavior text says "embedding vector produced" (actual model output), not just wrapper routing.
behaviors.test_description: Call the real embedding model with a fixed query, read the live index dimension from the vector DB schema/config, and assert vector length equals index dimension.

behaviors.description: Similarity search results are ordered by descending cosine similarity.
behaviors.justification: The risky failure is at real service-to-vector-DB boundary (metric config, distance-vs-similarity ordering, DB scoring semantics). In-process mocks can trivially pass while real DB behavior is wrong. Rejected Agentic because this behavior is about ranking math/order from retrieval infrastructure, not model judgment quality.
behaviors.test_description: Seed a real vector DB index with controlled vectors, issue a search through the API/service path, and assert returned scores are monotonic in descending cosine similarity (or equivalent transformed metric).

behaviors.description: LLM re-ranking changes ordering for nuanced-intent queries.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real LLM semantic judgment. Deterministic stubs always hide whether nuanced intent actually causes reorder. Rejected Workflow because this behavior targets one model decision point (reranker output change), not correctness of multiple agentic handoffs.
behaviors.test_description: Use a curated query/candidate set with known nuanced intent, run real LLM reranking, and assert final order differs from raw similarity order in expected direction for at least one case.

behaviors.description: No-close-match queries return empty results, not low-relevance noise.
behaviors.justification: This depends on real embedding/model semantic behavior plus thresholding; mocks can force empty/non-empty and miss real false positives from model-space noise. Rejected System as minimum because OS/network realism is not the core failure boundary; semantic model output is.
behaviors.test_description: Run real query embedding against a representative corpus with intentionally out-of-domain queries, execute normal retrieval threshold logic, and assert empty results for those cases.

behaviors.description: Median end-to-end latency stays below 2 seconds.
behaviors.justification: This is a real-infrastructure performance SLO across network/model/DB calls; mocks hide true latency. Rejected Agentic because pass/fail does not depend on semantic quality of model outputs. Rejected Workflow because behavior text measures timing only, not correctness across multiple model decisions/handoffs.
behaviors.test_description: Run production-like end-to-end load against the real API path (embedding call, vector search, rerank), collect latency distribution, and assert p50 < 2.0s over a stable sample window.
